mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_REQ_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_DIV, TRIP_TYPE_CDS, TRIP_PLACE, EQUIP_NM, TRIP_PLAN, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, TRIP_PURPOSE, PAY_AMT_KRW, PAY_AMT_USD, SALES_CNFRM_YN, USER_ID, FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(USER_ID) AS USER_NM, SALES_CNFRM_DT, TRIP_COND_CD, ETC, SPRT_TRFC_YN, SPRT_LDG_YN, SPRT_MEAL_YN, SPRT_ETC_YN, SPRT_ETC_TXT, SALES_CD, CLNT_CD, CLNT_PJT, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CLNT_PJT) AS CLNT_PJT_NM, PM_ID, FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(PM_ID) AS PM_NM, CURR_CD, EXRATE, PAY_DT, PAY_ID, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DTTM, UDT_ID, UDT_DTTM FROM TB_PM51M01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}

SELECT TRIP_REQ_NO, SEQ, USER_ID, DEPT_NM, POSITION_NM, USER_NM, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, EAT_CNT, TRAFFIC_AMT, LODGING_AMT, MEAL_AMT, DAILY_AMT, SPECIAL_AMT, TOTAL_AMT, ETC FROM TB_PM51D01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo} ORDER BY SEQ
SELECT TRIP_REQ_NO, SEQ, EXP_ITEM_CD, CURR_CD, KRW_AMT, USD_AMT, CALC_BASIS, REMARK FROM TB_PM51D02 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo} ORDER BY SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BT' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(MOD(TB_PM51M01_SQ01.NEXTVAL, 10000), 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_PM51M01 ( TRIP_REQ_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_DIV, TRIP_TYPE_CDS, TRIP_PLACE, EQUIP_NM, TRIP_PLAN, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, TRIP_PURPOSE, PAY_AMT_KRW, PAY_AMT_USD, SALES_CNFRM_YN, USER_ID, SALES_CNFRM_DT, TRIP_COND_CD, ETC, SPRT_TRFC_YN, SPRT_LDG_YN, SPRT_MEAL_YN, SPRT_ETC_YN, SPRT_ETC_TXT, SALES_CD, CLNT_CD, CLNT_PJT, PM_ID, CURR_CD, EXRATE, PAY_DT, PAY_ID, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{tripReqNo}, #{coCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripTypeCds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripPlace, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripStDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripEdDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nightCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dayCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{tripPurpose, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payAmtKrw, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{payAmtUsd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{salesCnfrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesCnfrmDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripCondCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{etc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtTrfcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtLdgYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtMealYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtEtcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtEtcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clntCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clntPjt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pmId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exrate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{payDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'APRVSTS01', #{tripReqNo}, #{userId}, #{pgmId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET TRIP_DIV = #{tripDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_TYPE_CDS = #{tripTypeCds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_PLACE = #{tripPlace, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIP_NM = #{equipNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_PLAN = #{tripPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_ST_DTM = #{tripStDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_ED_DTM = #{tripEdDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NIGHT_CNT = #{nightCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DAY_CNT = #{dayCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TRIP_PURPOSE = #{tripPurpose, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAY_AMT_KRW = #{payAmtKrw, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PAY_AMT_USD = #{payAmtUsd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SALES_CNFRM_YN = #{salesCnfrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ID = #{reqId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALES_CNFRM_DT = #{salesCnfrmDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_COND_CD = #{tripCondCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ETC = #{etc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_TRFC_YN = #{sprtTrfcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_LDG_YN = #{sprtLdgYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_MEAL_YN = #{sprtMealYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_ETC_YN = #{sprtEtcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_ETC_TXT = #{sprtEtcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALES_CD = #{salesCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLNT_CD = #{clntCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLNT_PJT = #{clntPjt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PM_ID = #{pmId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURR_CD = #{currCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXRATE = #{exrate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PAY_DT = #{payDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAY_ID = #{payId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}

UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET PAY_AMT_KRW = #{payAmtKrw, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PAY_AMT_USD = #{payAmtUsd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}
UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET APRV_STS_CD = #{aprvStsCd}, UDT_ID = #{todoId}, UDT_PGM = 'WB20', UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}
UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET PAY_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), PAY_ID = #{userId}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo} AND PAY_DT IS NULL
UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET PAY_DT = NULL, PAY_ID = NULL, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE TODO_NO = #{reqNo} AND SANCTN_STTUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE TODO_NO = #{reqNo} AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID = 'TODODIV2191' AND SANCTN_STTUS = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, ROWNUM AS SANCTN_SN, A.* FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT A.CO_CD AS WBS_PLANCO_CD, A.CO_CD, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(A.CO_CD) WBS_PLANCO_CD_NM, A.ID AS USR_NM, A.EMP_NO, A.NAME, A.TEL_NO, A.EMAIL, B.DEPT_NM AS DT_NM, D.LEVEL_NM AS JIK, 'TODODIV20' AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, '결재' AS GB, C.APP_SEQ AS SANCTN_SN, '' AS SANCTN_STTUS, C.APP_ID AS TODO_ID, '미승인' AS SANCTN_STTUS_NM, 'I' AS FLAG, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY C.APP_NO DESC) AS RNK FROM TB_CM06M01 A LEFT JOIN TB_BM13M01 C ON (A.ID = C.APP_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM07M01 D ON A.LEVEL_CD = D.LEVEL_CD LEFT JOIN TB_CM04M01 B ON (A.DEPT_ID = B.DEPT_ID) WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.ID = #{userId} AND C.APP_DIV = #{appDiv} ORDER BY C.APP_SEQ ASC ) T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.RNK = 1 ) AS A )

SELECT TRIP_RPT_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_REQ_NO, ACT_ST_DTM, ACT_ED_DTM, TRIP_PURPOSE, TRIP_RESULT, SELF_EVAL_CD, DEPT_EVAL_CD, FINAL_EVAL_CD, SPECIAL_NOTE, EXTEND_RSN, MINUTES_MISS_RSN, ADV_RCV_AMT_KRW, ADV_RCV_AMT_USD, SETTLE_AMT_KRW, SETTLE_AMT_USD, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DTTM, UDT_ID, UDT_DTTM FROM TB_PM52M01 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo}
SELECT TRIP_RPT_NO, SEQ, USE_DT, USE_DESC, PERSON_CNT, AMT, CURR_CD, EXP_ITEM_CD, PAY_MTHD_CD, REMARK FROM TB_PM52D01 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo} ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT TRIP_RPT_NO, SEQ, USER_ID, DEPT_NM, POSITION_NM, USER_NM, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, EAT_CNT, TRAFFIC_AMT, LODGING_AMT, MEAL_AMT, DAILY_AMT, SPECIAL_AMT, TOTAL_AMT, ETC FROM TB_PM52D02 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo} ORDER BY SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BR' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(MOD(TB_PM52M01_SQ01.NEXTVAL, 10000), 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_PM52M01 ( TRIP_RPT_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_REQ_NO, ACT_ST_DTM, ACT_ED_DTM, TRIP_PURPOSE, TRIP_RESULT, SELF_EVAL_CD, DEPT_EVAL_CD, FINAL_EVAL_CD, SPECIAL_NOTE, EXTEND_RSN, MINUTES_MISS_RSN, ADV_RCV_AMT_KRW, ADV_RCV_AMT_USD, SETTLE_AMT_KRW, SETTLE_AMT_USD, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{tripRptNo}, #{coCd}, #{tripReqNo}, #{actStDtm}, #{actEdDtm}, #{tripPurpose}, #{tripResult}, #{selfEvalCd}, #{deptEvalCd}, #{finalEvalCd}, #{specialNote}, #{extendRsn}, #{minutesMissRsn}, #{advRcvAmtKrw}, #{advRcvAmtUsd}, #{settleAmtKrw}, #{settleAmtUsd}, 'APRVSTS01', #{tripRptNo}, #{userId}, #{pgmId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PM52M01 SET ACT_ST_DTM = #{actStDtm}, ACT_ED_DTM = #{actEdDtm}, TRIP_PURPOSE = #{tripPurpose}, TRIP_RESULT = #{tripResult}, SELF_EVAL_CD = #{selfEvalCd}, DEPT_EVAL_CD = #{deptEvalCd}, FINAL_EVAL_CD = #{finalEvalCd}, SPECIAL_NOTE = #{specialNote}, EXTEND_RSN = #{extendRsn}, MINUTES_MISS_RSN = #{minutesMissRsn}, ADV_RCV_AMT_KRW = #{advRcvAmtKrw}, ADV_RCV_AMT_USD = #{advRcvAmtUsd}, SETTLE_AMT_KRW = #{settleAmtKrw}, SETTLE_AMT_USD = #{settleAmtUsd}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo}
